login.orWith: Sign in using your account with

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.name: Name
signup.terms: Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
signup.termsIntro: By signing up for the platform, you agree to the following:
signup.term1: The responsible use of the application and its functionalities.
signup.term2: The processing of your personal data in accordance with our privacy policy.
signup.term3: Not to use the platform for unauthorized or illegal purposes.
signup.term4: That the information provided is accurate and up to date.
signup.mustAgreeTerms: You must agree to the Terms and Conditions

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a recovery code.

verifyCode.title: Verify Code
verifyCode.description: Enter the 5-digit code sent to your email.

changePassword.title: Forgot Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: By accessing and using EduAirControl, you agree to comply with the following terms:
terms.li1: You will provide accurate and complete information.
terms.li2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
terms.li3: The platform must be used only for authorized and lawful purposes.
terms.li4: Environmental data provided by the system is for monitoring and reporting purposes only.
terms.footer1: EduAirControl reserves the right to update these terms at any time.
terms.footer2: By clicking "Accept", you confirm that you have read and agreed to these Terms and Conditions.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.emptyHint: Mark a heart on the dashboard to add favorites

profile.title: Personal Information
profile.description: This information will be displayed publicly so be careful what you share.

settings.title: Settings
settings.langDescription: Choose what language and date format to use throughout your account.
settings.remindersDescription: Set which notifications you want to receive.
settings.privacyDescription: Control who can see your information and how it is used.
settings.privacyInfo: Your data is only visible to your institution's administrators.
settings.deleteAccountSub: This action is permanent and irreversible
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure? All your data will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteAccountDetail: Your profile, favorite environments, and activity history will be deleted.
settings.deleteRequestSent: Request sent. We will contact you shortly.
settings.helpDescription: Find answers and contact the support team.
settings.helpFaqSub: Answers to the most common questions

passwordModal.title: Change password
passwordModal.errorLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

faq.q1: How do I add a favorite environment?
faq.a1: Press the heart icon on any environment card in the ranking.
faq.q2: How do I change the language?
faq.a2: Go to Settings → Languages and Dates → Update.
faq.q3: What do the status colors mean?
faq.a3: Green = Normal, Yellow = Warning, Red = Critical alert.
faq.a4: Yes, go to Management and press 'Add Environment'.

terms.intro: By accessing and using EduAirControl, you agree to comply with the following terms:
terms.li1: You will provide accurate and complete information.
terms.li2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials.
terms.li3: The platform must be used only for authorized and lawful purposes.
terms.li4: Environmental data is for monitoring and reporting purposes only.
terms.footer: EduAirControl reserves the right to update these terms at any time.

privacyModal.intro: At EduAirControl we are committed to protecting your personal information:
privacyModal.li1: We do not sell or share your data with third parties without your consent.
privacyModal.li2: Your data is stored securely with encryption.
privacyModal.li3: You can request deletion of your account and data at any time.
privacyModal.li4: We only collect data necessary for the platform to function.
privacyModal.footer: For more information contact us at support@eduaircontrol.com.

detail.qualityDesc: Based on CO₂, temperature, humidity and noise levels in the environment.
